zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England於1480年出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆時，他的父親Thomas Perpoynt25歲，母親Agnes21歲。他於1521年之前與Joanne在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1555年在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England was born in 1480, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Perpoynt, was 25 and his mother, Agnes, was 21. He married Joanne before 1521, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1555, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England est né en 1480, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Perpoynt, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joanne avant 1521, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1555, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England 1480 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Perpoynt 25 und seine Mutter Agnes 21. Er hat vor 1521 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom Joanne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1555 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England è nato il nel 1480 nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Perpoynt, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joanne prima del 1521, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1555, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, Englandが1480年にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Perpoyntは25歳，母Agnesは21歳であった。1521年以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムでJoanneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1555年に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England(이)가 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Perpoynt(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1521년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 Joanne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1555년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England nasceu em 1480, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Perpoynt, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanne antes 1521, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1555, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England родился в 1480 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Perpoynt было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne перед 1521 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1555 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England nació en 1480, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Perpoynt, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joanne antes de 1521, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1555, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
